violations.text: Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the high temp. dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 Door Reach-In Freezer were observed to have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025

At the time of inspection, the drain to the pre-flush sink in the counter prior to the dish machine, was observed to be leaking. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/14/2025
The walk-in was observed with an ambient temperature of 55 degrees. Establishment to get unit serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
